theme: the self-contained-demo release — give stack-demo/ its OWN platform clone set so a box with only stack-demo/ (no stack-dev/) can run a demo end-to-end. A single section milestone M26 that re-implements the orphaned m26/self-contained-demo branch (@25ab855, predates v1.6/v1.7 — unmergeable) onto current main, preserving the stack-secrets module + M30 BASE_ENV provision + M31 mkcert + M32 studio-desk fix. A NEW demo-stack/ensure-clones.sh bootstraps stack-demo's peer clones; up-injected.sh moves the build SOURCE + the compose dir (PLAT, D-MAIN) to stack-demo so ALL services build from it; dev-image reuse is gated behind --reuse-dev-images (OFF by default). Tooling + docs only — zero platform-repo edits.
